PaymentCollectionStatusEnum.description:
* `otp_required` - OTP required
* `momo_pending` - Awaiting MoMo approval
* `card_pending` - Awaiting card payment
* `failed` - Collection failed

payment_otp_required.description: Moolre returned TP14 — payer must submit SMS OTP before collection completes.

payment_collection_status.description:
Moolre collection step: otp_required → verify-otp → momo_pending → callback.

* `otp_required` - OTP required
* `momo_pending` - Awaiting MoMo approval
* `card_pending` - Awaiting card payment
* `failed` - Collection failed

pin.description: Optional combined pin: 4-digit station PIN + 5-char attendant PIN

reading.description: Tank level in litres at this station for this fuel type.
Tank level in litres at this station for this fuel type.

TankReadingHistory.description: Full history row including tank_reading — used on the global history list.

TankReadingHistoryEntry.description: History row without nesting tank_reading — used inside tank detail and nested routes.
